reviews.review_description: I ask what is the point of playing a game when the touch controller is not coordinated to work with this game The Asylum. The developers should not have released this as game and just made it as a short movie for vr.
Be great game if you could walk but can’t figure it out how too
Will not go forward on my controller only side-to-side and backwards very frustrating! Looks like a great game, but very disappointed!

developer_response.body:
Hi dojomo7, thanks for playing our games. Please make sure to update your controller bios to the latest version since it looks like there is some sort of compatibility issue with some older versions. 
KR Games team

reviews.review_description: It's great to see kr  games release more horror apps for the go and gear vr and I look forward to the Allison dairy series being ported to the quest soon. if possible please add gamepad support with rotation and rotation for the go and gear vr controllers too. oh by the way how do you get more ammo?

2nd Update: It's been nearly three months since this was released and still no update to address the issue with its Go controller support. Now it's on sale. If you plan to play it on the Go, don't bother, not even for free, it's unplayable on the Go. It's a shame since it looks like it had a lot of potential.

Update: Unfortunately I purchased this again after the developer's response. There is no update available for my Go controller, it's at the latest version available. Now that the OS update 12 is available, I tried yet again to get this game to work. If your finger is just in the perfect spot and the planets align you might be able to walk forward for a few seconds until it locks again and you can only move left and right or back. The controller works in every other game, I can see that the touchpad is tracking perfectly in Oculus home because the blue indicator tracks precisely. The controls simply don't work on the Go.  If there's no response and no patch I will never buy anything from this developer again.

Original Review:

I was looking forward to playing this. The graphics look nice for a Go game. Unfortunately the controls are broken. It's extremely difficult to walk forward. Strafing left and right and moving backwards work just fine.

I tried these steps to resolve the problem:

1) Reset the headset.
2) Reinstall the game. However the game wouldn't uninstall, so I...
3) Did a Factory Reset, then reinstalled the game.

Step four is to request a refund.

I'm going to keep an eye on this to see if it gets updated and has more positive reviews.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jioxx, thanks for playing our games. Please make sure to update your controller bios to the latest version since it looks like there is some sort of compatibility issue with some older versions. 
KR Games team

reviews.review_description: Kinda pointless there’s about 12 zombies they come in twos once you kill all 12 of them you’re just running back-and-forth so far I found two doors to open killed all 12 zombies picked up all the health packs and the four ammo packs I could find kill the zombies now there’s nothing left to do no zombies nowhere to go. How do you beat this game?

Bought this on Jan 20, 2020 taking a chance the controls were fixed after all the negative comments but no. Very good graphics but without a way to smoothly move forward I'm dumbfounded how the dev's are ignoring this and not fixing it  Hey dev's,  did you even test this title before releasing it?
Paid for the gane and it says it can't  be installed wtf!
The controls do not work. I cannot move forward. I want a refund.
